steps.title: Join two clauses
steps.content: The first clause is that the Australian Desert is an arid desert. The next clause says that, with a total area of about 2,700,000 km², it is one of the largest deserts. Two independent clauses need a comma plus a coordinating conjunction.

steps.title: Reject incomplete joins
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. Choice C has and but no comma before the second independent clause. Choice D leaves the clauses fused with no connector. The comma plus and correctly joins the clauses. The answer is B.
